title: alopecurus pratensis subsp. laguriformis
intro: Alopecurus pratensis subsp. laguriformis, also known as Lagurus or meadow brome grass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Lagurus include its ability to treat conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Lagurus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
